hero_subtitle: 2755 NC Hwy 58 S • Pollocksville, NC 28573 • Saturdays 8 AM – 2 PM
hero_description: Shop local vendors, browse flea market treasures, enjoy food trucks, and discover something new every Saturday.
about_text: Community Consignment Craft & Things Flea Market is your local weekend destination for crafts, flea market treasures, consignment finds, food trucks, produce, and unique vendors from across the area.
